description: Legal deed (iqrār). In which Maymūn b. Yūsuf b. Ibrāhīm al-Yahūdī (perhaps the same as in T-S AS 147.122?), whose physical features (ḥilya) are described, affirms that he is the agent of Isḥāq b. Ibrāhīm b. [...] al-Muslim al-Mukandij (the closet maker), whose physical features are also described, for the purpose of collecting the amount of money owed to the latter from the 'ṣundūq al-nafaqāt' in Qalʿat al-Jabal.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
